Verdict

Q-DEMO-COMMITTEE

frozen 2026-07-22 · challenge model · run Q-DEMO-COMMITTEE-mc300-s42-9632bc874eb5

Live-searched inputs. Formalized with web search on, so the inputs reflect the web as of the freeze date — not a clean historical backtest.

Most likely: Resolution urging cooperation — 96% of 300 simulated draws. The forecast median is 35 on the 0-100 scale, in the band “Resolution urging cooperation” (25–49).

What would change this: moderates.position — moving it across its stated range swings the forecast by -10.0 points (25 to 15).

Reading

The scale runs 0 to 100. 0 means maximal pressure — a censure resolution referring the matter upward. 100 means maximal accommodation — the board closes the file. The forecast sits at 35 — around the midpoint.

The players and where they stand:

  • Pressure bloc sits at the far low end; the outcome is a defining issue for it.
  • Aligned moderates sits toward the low end; the outcome is a live concern for it.
  • Accommodation bloc sits toward the high end; the outcome is a live concern for it.
  • Non-aligned swing bloc sits close to the midpoint; the outcome is a live concern for it.

The settlement is a capability×salience weighted average of these positions. The heaviest weights sit with Pressure bloc (46% of the weight) and Aligned moderates (23% of the weight), pulling the result near the low end. The closed-form weighted mean lands at 34.

Genuinely uncertain: Non-aligned swing bloc's position (anywhere from 30 to 74); Non-aligned swing bloc's salience (anywhere from 20 to 55); Accommodation bloc's position (anywhere from 58 to 88).

Analyst brief

Band probabilities

bandrangeP(draws)
Censure and referral upward0–243%
Resolution urging cooperation (modal, median)25–4996%
No new action; left to the diplomatic track50–740%
Board welcomes restored access / closes the file75–1000%

Both solvers, side by side

modelmedianband
this run (challenge)34.8Resolution urging cooperation
compromise weighted-mean (closed form)34.5Resolution urging cooperation

The two solvers differ by 0.3 points and land in the same band. Their outputs are shown side by side, never blended into one number.

What rests on sources vs inference

Sourced — traces to fetched sources or supplied text:

  • Pressure bloc — 1 evidence note(s)
  • Aligned moderates — 1 evidence note(s)

Inferred — asserted where the sources were silent:

  • The swing bloc is treated as a single actor.
    Sources report its members voting together but do not define it as a formal bloc.
  • Board composition is unchanged from the prior session.
    No source confirms the roster seated for this meeting.

What to watch — sensitivity

WARNING — degenerate median lock: 9 of 12 sensitivity rows have zero swing. The weighted median is pinned, so most single-parameter moves do not shift the forecast; the Monte-Carlo spread comes only from the few live parameters.

Reproduce

schelling solve <game>.json --seed 42 --solver challenge --draws 300
